name: beStill
description: A food delivery and pick-up platform connecting customers with local restaurants. Provides a flexible platform for restaurants and driver partners.
features: Real-time tracking of delivery drivers on interactive maps.
Dynamic restaurant menu browsing with custom modifiers.
Live order status notifications from preparation to delivery.
my_role: Mobile Application Engineer - Built a highly synchronized three-way ecosystem (Customer, Driver, Restaurant). Overcame challenges with real-time location streaming and complex state management to ensure accurate delivery ETAs.
